_meta.title: Migrate Hostnames and Group Membership Between Graphs
_meta.description: Copy hostnames and group assignments from an old saved OSPF/IS-IS graph to the latest upload.
_meta.og_description: After configuring hostnames and groups on one graph snapshot, migrate them to the latest upload in one step.
_meta.meta_keywords: topolograph, OSPF, IS-IS, hostname, group migration, graph snapshot

intro_footer: Once you have set hostnames and assigned each router to its group — copy these values to the latest uploaded graph.
th_migrate_from: Migrate hostnames and group membership from graph
